name: Patreon
collaborationStyle: membership launch, behind-the-scenes pitch, sponsored mention
notes: Applies to almost any creator who wants to offer memberships, bonus content, or fan support.

name: Substack
collaborationStyle: newsletter launch, writing journey, paid subscription story
notes: Defining platform for paid newsletters; fits any creator building an email or writing audience.

name: Gumroad
collaborationStyle: product launch, digital sales story, creator-business demo
notes: Sell digital products and memberships; applies across niches for anyone monetizing beyond ads.

name: Kickstarter
collaborationStyle: campaign launch, backer story, project reveal
notes: Crowdfunding for projects and products; fits creators with engaged audiences who back ideas.

name: Indiegogo
collaborationStyle: campaign story, crowdfunding walkthrough, product pre-launch
notes: Crowdfunding and pre-orders; strong for product, tech, and creative project creators.

name: GoFundMe
collaborationStyle: cause story, community support pitch, fundraiser integration
notes: Fundraising for causes and personal needs; fits creators who run or promote fundraisers.

name: ConvertKit
collaborationStyle: email list build, funnel story, creator-business demo
notes: Email and landing pages for creators; cross-niche fit for anyone building an audience.

name: Mailchimp
collaborationStyle: newsletter launch, marketing automation story, audience growth demo
notes: Email and marketing platform; fits creators who do newsletters, launches, or audience building.

name: Discord
collaborationStyle: community launch, server tour, membership or tier integration
notes: Community and chat platform; applies to any creator building a Discord server or paid community.

name: Amazon Associates
collaborationStyle: affiliate link integration, product list or haul, recommendation segment
notes: Affiliate program; fits any creator who recommends products, books, or gear.

name: Ko-fi
collaborationStyle: tip-jar integration, support call-to-action, sponsored segment
notes: Great for smaller or niche creators whose audiences want a simple way to show support.

name: Spring (formerly Teespring)
collaborationStyle: merch launch, product showcase, campaign integration
notes: Works with any channel that has in-jokes, slogans, or visual branding that can be turned into merch.

name: Shopify Collabs
collaborationStyle: storefront integration, product launch, creator-business story
notes: Good fit for creators who sell products, partner with brands, or want to highlight creator commerce tools.

name: Linktree
collaborationStyle: link-in-bio overhaul, ecosystem walkthrough, sponsored mention
notes: Applies to creators of any niche who juggle multiple links, offers, or platforms.

name: Squarespace
collaborationStyle: website build, portfolio or shop highlight, sponsored integration
notes: Versatile website sponsor that works for any creator needing a home base for their brand.

name: Printful
collaborationStyle: merch drop, print-on-demand story, store walkthrough
notes: Print-on-demand and fulfillment; fits any creator selling apparel or physical products.

name: Printify
collaborationStyle: merch store setup, product showcase, ecommerce integration
notes: Print-on-demand marketplace; strong for creators with multiple products or niches.

name: TeePublic
collaborationStyle: design drop, fan art or slogan merch, affiliate integration
notes: Artist and creator merch platform; fits design, fandom, or quote-heavy channels.

name: Redbubble
collaborationStyle: merch store tour, design story, passive income mention
notes: Print-on-demand marketplace; good for creators with visual identity or catchphrases.

name: Stan Store
collaborationStyle: all-in-one storefront demo, link-in-bio plus sales, creator stack story
notes: Single storefront for links, products, and courses; fits multi-offer creators.

name: Beacons
collaborationStyle: link-in-bio overhaul, media kit story, analytics integration
notes: Link-in-bio and creator page tool; fits anyone consolidating links and offers.

name: Kajabi
collaborationStyle: course or community launch, funnel walkthrough, creator-business story
notes: Courses, memberships, and funnels; fits educators and experts monetizing content.

name: Thinkific
collaborationStyle: course build story, student success, creator-educator demo
notes: Course creation and sales; strong for teaching, coaching, and how-to creators.

name: Podia
collaborationStyle: digital product launch, course or membership demo, no-fee story
notes: Sell courses, memberships, and downloads; fits small to mid creators going paid.

name: Ghost
collaborationStyle: newsletter or blog migration, membership story, independent publishing demo
notes: Publishing and membership platform; fits writers and creators going subscription.

name: Circle
collaborationStyle: community launch, member space tour, paid community story
notes: Community and courses in one place; fits creators building paid or free communities.

name: Canva
collaborationStyle: branding/graphic demo, thumbnail or asset creation, sponsored tutorial
notes: Useful for nearly any creator who designs thumbnails, overlays, or simple brand assets.

name: Buy Me a Coffee
collaborationStyle: tip or support call-to-action, lightweight membership pitch, sponsored mention
notes: Simple way for fans to support creators; fits small or niche channels.

name: Beehiiv
collaborationStyle: newsletter launch, growth tools demo, creator-newsletter story
notes: Newsletter platform with growth tools; fits creators serious about email.

name: Stir
collaborationStyle: split payments story, collab revenue demo, creator-pay integration
notes: Payments for creator collabs; fits duos, podcasts, and multi-creator projects.

name: Passionfroot
collaborationStyle: media kit or rate card story, brand deal workflow, creator-business demo
notes: Media kit and brand deal tool; fits creators pitching brands or agencies.

name: Pico
collaborationStyle: link-in-bio or storefront demo, micro-store story, creator page showcase
notes: Creator page and links; fits nano and micro creators consolidating presence.

name: Lumanu
collaborationStyle: payments or contracts story, brand deal workflow, creator ops demo
notes: Payments and workflow for creator deals; fits creators doing regular brand work.

name: Collabstr
collaborationStyle: brand deal discovery story, marketplace walkthrough, sponsorship pitch
notes: Creator marketplace for brand deals; fits smaller creators seeking first deals.

name: Grapevine
collaborationStyle: brand campaign story, deal workflow, creator marketplace mention
notes: Influencer marketplace and campaigns; fits creators open to brand outreach.

name: Throne
collaborationStyle: wishlist integration, fan gift story, support or merch mention
notes: Wishlist for creators; fits streamers and anyone with a dedicated fan base.

name: Streamlabs
collaborationStyle: stream setup story, tipping or alerts demo, creator tools integration
notes: Streaming and tipping tools; fits live streamers and gaming creators.

name: Restream
collaborationStyle: multistream story, going live workflow, platform reach demo
notes: Multistream to multiple platforms; fits streamers and live creators.

name: Fourthwall
collaborationStyle: creator store launch, merch and products story, brand-built store demo
notes: Creator stores and merch; fits creators who want a dedicated brand store.

name: Fanbase
collaborationStyle: subscription or content story, fan club launch, alternative platform demo
notes: Subscription and content platform for creators; fits creators building a paid fan space.
